thought.text: Now I need to update the CMakeLists to generate both lexer and parser:

action.command:
cat > /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/CMakeLists.txt << 'CMAKEOF'
if(NOT antlr4-runtime_FOUND OR NOT antlr4-generator_FOUND)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "未找到 ANTLR4 ！")
endif()

antlr4_generate(
  task2-antlr-lexer # 唯一标识名
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsULexer.g4 # 输入文件
  LEXER # 生成类型：LEXER/PARSER/BOTH
  FALSE # 是否生成 listener
  FALSE # 是否生成 visitor
  "" # C++ 命名空间
)

antlr4_generate(
  task2-antlr-parser # 唯一标识名
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsUParser.g4 # 输入文件
  PARSER # 生成类型：LEXER/PARSER/BOTH
  FALSE # 是否生成 listener
  FALSE # 是否生成 visitor
  "" # C++ 命名空间
)

file(GLOB _common_src ../common/*)
file(GLOB _src *.cpp *.hpp *.c *.h)
add_executable(task2 ${_common_src} ${_src} ${ANTLR4_SRC_FILES_task2-antlr-lexer} ${ANTLR4_SRC_FILES_task2-antlr-parser})

target_include_directories(
  task2 PRIVATE . ../common ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR_task2-antlr-lexer} ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR_task2-antlr-parser}
                ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
target_include_directories(task2 SYSTEM PRIVATE ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR}
                                                ${LLVM_INCLUDE_DIRS})

target_link_libraries(task2 antlr4_static LLVM)
CMAKEOF

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "cat > /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/CMakeLists.txt << 'CMAKEOF'

  FALSE # 是否生成 listener
  FALSE # 是否生成 visitor
  "" # C++ 命名空间
)

antlr4_generate(

  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsUParser.g4 # 输入文件
  PARSER # 生成类型：LEXER/PARSER/BOTH

  FALSE # 是否生成 visitor

file(GLOB _common_src ../common/*)
file(GLOB _src *.cpp *.hpp *.c *.h)
add_executable(task2 ${_common_src} ${_src} ${ANTLR4_SRC_FILES_task2-antlr-lexer} ${ANTLR4_SRC_FILES_task2-antlr-parser})

target_include_directories(

                ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
target_include_directories(task2 SYSTEM PRIVATE ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR}
                                                ${LLVM_INCLUDE_DIRS})

target_link_libraries(task2 antlr4_static LLVM)
CMAKEOF", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Update CMakeLists to generate both lexer and parser"}

summary: Update CMakeLists to generate both lexer and parser
